changelog: First-run "Choose your layout" modal is gone. Both Dev and Official now default to the Left Sidebar layout immediately on first launch — no chooser, no friction.

DEV channel keeps the Settings → Layout → Change Layout option so we can A/B between Top Bar and Left Sidebar for testing. OFFICIAL channel hides this option entirely so end users only ever see the canonical sidebar UI.
Mandatory:true so v1.44.40 dev installs upgrade automatically.
